[{"Name":"Nishant Sharma","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUiKpquwmiJEJpUin01WuowZXpHKqs4RlrrUJXk24vptDbEYf04=s120-c-rp-mo-ba5-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We got our roof replacement done by Durham roofing (Mike & his team) around mid-April 2023. We had initially contacted Mike in Jan-2023. Due to high winds, 1 of our roof soffit fascia metal strip had been damaged & flown off, leaving a gap & exposed the wood. Due to bad weather, snow etc, we were worried if snow / ice / water, went in, further damage will be done on the inside of attic. Mike responded promptly and we discussed the cost of fixing the issue (by exchanging the damaged area pics), his quote was very reasonable and thanks to Mike, we didn't have to defer fixing the exposed fascia till spring or summer. When Mike came to do the work, he also inspected our roof and told us that there were rotted plywood underneath in some areas and we should get the roof replaced soon. So we told him that this was already on our "to-do" list and we decided to circle back in April & get it done. Mike gave us a 3-day window in mid-April when the weather was OK enough to proceed with the work. His crew arrived on time and finished the work in 3-days. They made sure all the debris upon removal of the old roof was gone & Mike also provided me pics of the damaged area of the ply-board on both front & back side , which they replaced. Although not required, but I went with full ice & water shield under the certainteed shingles, so I am expecting them to last long. I would highly recommend Mike & Durham roofing for all your roofing repair & replacement needs. They are reliable / cost effective & professional. Highly recommended.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICxz46WWg&fid=0x0:0xb8c0004d41d48c42"],"When":"2023-5-29"},{"Name":"MS D","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjVsTuJ1VpqqlwBhZfAf7YqSrTHYS81IGeu-s2GHGs0tTWC1x5BU=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I got one of the roof vent replaced. Mike is professional and super fast in his work. I would recommend Durham Region Roofing for any roofing services.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Scott S","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjX2fJFj7aAGxf9IuiEn73bXeS3m4aIjAHTSJdnSqa9GYzLcR7HL=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"You can't put a price on peace of mind.

We had Mike and his crew out in autumn 2024 to replace the roof we had installed by another company in 2023.

In stark contrast to Alpha Roofing, Mike and his crew actually took care of our largest investment, and took pride in their work. If we could do it over again, I wouldn't even bother getting quotes from another company, I would just go straight to Mike.

Mike and his team took their time and did the job right. He kept us informed of his progress all the way through, but more importantly, they were transparent about process, the issues they uncovered along the way and how they were fixing/addressing them.

As I mentioned, the previous company we hired (Alpha Roofing) compromised the integrity of our home. We had 20+ exposed nails, no starter shingles, no snow/ice membrane and improperly installed shingles (all of which void the shingle warranty and would nullify any insurance claims related to roof, like water damage).

Mike took photos of everything for us–all the shortcuts, problems and areas of concern. He walked us through it all and explained how to do it properly. He fixed our roof and helped us with our claim. A real class act.

I can confidently say that Mike might be the best money you can spend on your home, because I know what it looks like to pay the wrong people. It's hard to articulate the peace of mind we've enjoyed since Durham Roofing helped us out.

And, as a real testament to their quality of their work, we live right on the lake, we get high winds and tons of exposure to the elements–unbelievable snow and rain storms–and their roof has stood up to it all. It's a masterclass in roofing, and I'm glad we Durham Roofing around to helps us.

Mike is your guy. Spend the money and sleep well.

They answered any questions I had without hesitation and made sure I always knew what was going on throughout the project.

One thing that really stood out to me was how seriously they took the cleanup. I’ve heard plenty of stories from friends about other companies leaving behind nails, shingles, or a mess in the yard, so I was prepared for the worst—but C&D completely surprised me. At the end of each day, they made sure my property looked just as clean as (if not cleaner than) when they started. They picked up every piece of debris, checked the yard carefully, and made sure nothing was left behind. As a homeowner, that level of care means a lot.

Their workmanship was excellent, but their attitude and respect for my home made the biggest difference. You can tell this crew takes pride in what they do, and they treat your property like it’s their own. I’m truly happy with the results and extremely satisfied with the whole experience from start to finish.

If you’re looking for a roofing company that shows up, works hard, treats you right, and leaves your home spotless, I highly recommend C&D Roofing and Contracting. title: Midway Home Improvements
user_reviews: [{"Name":"Steven Olidis","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXeP26Nf7x9IRDg-xaet-dLtu00zlZURbyQCQ1GbjMrI3JeFgyxXg=s120-c-rp-mo-ba4-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Hi folks,\nIf you're looking to replace your roof please avoid this company at all costs. I paid $9000 to do a detached home in August 2014, we had builder shingles that were falling apart and decided to spend money to get our roof done properly. We paid for Certainteed landmark 240lb shingle with underlayment, ice shield and replace flashing around our brick. So this was a huge investment and roof has held up, however fast forward to 7 years later when I had to go into the attic and also had my father in-law help replace a vent between my house and the neighbours house. I find out that in the attic the guys they hired to replace my roof put a hole through the wood sheathing and just shingled over it. They didn't bother telling me that it needed to be replaced. I would have been happy to pay for the sheet if it meant that it was done right. As well  when my father in-law went to replace washroom vent on one gable end of my house, there's a small over hang with shingles where he discovered that they had never removed the original shingles and left them as is. They knew that I would have never been able to see this from the road or back yard since my house is pretty close to my neighbour. Essentially I'm not sure what the hole in the sheathing will mean for me in the future but I know that any warranty from Certainteed is probably null and void since the roof was not installed properly. I've tried calling and emailing the company about 3 or 4 times already since November 2021, left messages and no one has the decency to call me back to even discuss this. You would think that a company that prides themselves on being a certainteed certified installer would stand by their work. I don't want much but I just would have liked to have received what I paid for and was willing to have a civil conversation with regards to my roof issues. I have tried to be decent but they've left me no choice but to start posting my bad experience and I'm sure there are more unhappy customers out there. I do plan on getting my ladder and taking pictures to post on here as soon as weather permits.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Tim Daley","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocLtT7C6XQL8SmRysflewszYkw3B4Fi1C3SPRJYLATxXNJJ2=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Excellent workmanship!  Contracted to replace shingles on 41 townhouse roofs.  Best quote obtained.  No issues after 8 years.  Cleaned up at end of each day.  No complaints from 41 units.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jamie Bishop","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI0S4IbkI0FarhDjmrgQlsdDa0u593oimQESy_NZG0vrnwfng=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Brutal. Would not return my calls or notes about roof repair. Avoid this company, they do not stand behind their work.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"marg van dusen","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJDgbgLvoNYpwuBWeLE_XHRki0NgeqIOx_KvdQSIBHi0mnUfw=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Did a great job - prompt, professional,   would recommend to anyone.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Wayne Orpin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWmvGZ17XdCT2y0qWlXfmO3IZCvmaatjqszhJPF_C-1e127cMyS=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":1,"Description":"Worst  Roof","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Brenda Pierce","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWJx9vm4RUZnxBvzNi9KR1y-atjRlQkkL8XDG-aVZz-m9tTXUYWgw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":2,"Description":"","Images":null,"When":""}]

We are very satisfied with Ajax Roofing's work and professionalism.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhD5jXz3283WWoPlVTXwJxdM&fid=0x0:0xa57742268784f08a"],"When":"2025-6-22"},{"Name":"Hilary Duffin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJFlwqoBHlxaiY3vx1GsK1_kbWpxPmg6A4bDZ1_McGkOUQu8Q=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had the pleasure of dealing with Caleb during our roofing experience. The roofing team were true stars, so clean, so efficient, they even rescued my sons foam rocket that he lost on the roof and left it at the door for him. We also have 3 dogs, they were very patient with letting me take them out for bathroom breaks. Thank you Ajax Roofing for a great experience and great quality!!","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kenneth Chernabrow","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocKF18SjWfRXmcxiaKbKRac6zSepmJGmYKpHSiQ2A98NN1HwzA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Ajax Roofing is by far the best roofing company I've dealt with.  They replaced my shingles and kitchen skylight.  I have no qualms about recommending them.

Travis provided a very complete description of the work that was to be done. The quote included all the steps suggested by the manufacturers.  Ice and water shields, underlays, drip edges, etc.  Don’t fool yourself.  You really want the contractor to follow the manufacturers recommendations.

The skylight being 40 plus years needed to be replaced. We opted for skylight with a solar powered blind. Nice.

Workmanship by the crew was top notch.  Tables and chairs around the perimeter of the house were moved or protected by tarps.  Gardens were covered.  The cleanup at the end of job was followed up the next day by an inspection and further cleanup.  All members of the crew were friendly and happy to answer any questions I had.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Jason Whyte","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocIk52pebZGQyW-_dkfb7YLQMdqshA4XGD-eo1FQUYEaL8bt_A=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Can't thank ajax roofing and repairs enough. I had a leak coming my through my bathroom fan. I contacted a "roofer to come and have a look. He said everything seemed to be find and could just be condinsesation. Leak continued and hot worse. Called another "roofer" to come have a look and see if he could figure it out. He went on my roof said everything was fine. He then went into my attic and said everything was fine and couldn't see how it coukd leak. Still, the leak persisted. I contacted ajax roofing to come have a look. Brad came here, went on my roof, went in the attic and immediately knew why it was leaking. He explained everything in great detail. My insulated pipes that went from my bathroom vent and connected to a roof vent was not installed properly. There was numerous large bends in the pipe and it was not connected properly to the roof vent. Upon removing my insulated pipe which was only tuck taped to the roof vent, my pipe had chunks of ice in it from having to large of bends in it. Brad installed a high grade vent in my roof, installed a new insulting pipe that ren straight from my bathroom vent into the roof vent. I couldn't be more happier and I will be referring ajax roofing to anyone who needs a great well educated roofing contractor. Thank you so much travis and brad","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Kristina Facchini","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI2Fk6y19SBQGO0y4WbiiXnNA9X-tLlOrFOSLKCaVyj0tlMcg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Fantastic experience with Ajax Roofing! Amazing team who are extremely customer oriented. From start to finish they provided excellent recommendations and solutions.
Fully support and back you through the entire process. Communication is superior as well as their availability to take calls and answer questions with ease.

Please accept this as my highest possible recommendation. They provide service most companies now a days are lacking.","Images":null,"When":""}]

The work was well documented with photographs and a written report. I will be using Chris for my next project.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB8G1GYjK0ueaIRn5G7jNIW&fid=0x0:0xcf21934133c890a1"],"When":"2025-11-11"},{"Name":"Ray Williams","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWkHrBcQjKClgr4BiCBc1Nc4Revyjai_xtXja4cOsH1qkRdWu_7=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a very positive experience with Over-The-Top on a full reroof of our home. From start to finish, everything was handled with professionalism and attention to detail.

The quality of the finished roof exceeded my expectations—both in terms of the product itself and the overall look. Chris, the owner, was fantastic throughout the process. He kept in regular contact, providing updates, photos, and videos so I always knew what was happening.

The crew arrived right on time and worked efficiently make sure everything was done by the end of the day. They also took great care to cover any exposed patio furniture and made sure the property was spotless when they wrapped up. Their pricing was very competitive, and there was never any pressure to add extras or services I didn’t want. Just honest, quality work.

Highly recommend Over-The-Top to anyone looking for a reliable roofing company that delivers exactly what they promise.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCo1cTRJw&fid=0x0:0xcf21934133c890a1"],"When":"2025-4-18"},{"Name":"Taylor Leca","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW-F8rg83Tjys67Ed_fcXcchIYxFYk5ku2Innai-s_hMEFrLGk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"Truly incredible roofing company. The previous roofing company had shingled over top of the old shingles causing major issues that luckily Chris caught. He also notified us of water damage around our skylights and on the plywood and replaced it all for us. We received updates throughout the day and came home to a clean yard/driveway. If we didn't see the new roof, we wouldn't have believed they were there, that's how efficient and clean his team was. He followed up with pictures from a drone that documented the work throughout the day and the finished product. Over the top perfectly describes this company, as there was nothing missed and the service was above and beyond. You will not go wrong with hiring them for roofing, skylights, chimney removal, or vent installation. Thank you, Chris!","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhB0YR19RZFSzGsAYvm8eGyi&fid=0x0:0xcf21934133c890a1"],"When":"2025-7-15"},{"Name":"Lis Storgaard","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjXXIRTNQKNfTcxouxYsyVYIe5PLNWHV5ZVSrn-2UgnFyCSRdhxA=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We recently had our roof replaced by Over the Top, and I can’t say enough good things about the experience. From start to finish, Mint Roofing exceeded my expectations. After being recommended by several people, I reached out for a roof "tune-up," and it’s easy to see why they come highly recommended. The owner, Chris Knott, personally called me the same day I submitted my request. Shortly after, I was contacted by a project manager, and within 24 hours, two team members, Justin and Damien, were on-site. Both were professional, courteous, and reassured me that they would take the best care of our roof.

They worked diligently for about four hours, addressing every detail, no matter how small. From replacing and re-gluing loose shingles to fixing nail pops, they ensured everything was flawless. The detailed report they provided is not only a great reference but also a valuable resource for insurance purposes.

When it’s time for a full roof replacement, there’s no question I’ll be reaching out to Mint Roofing again. Their expertise and professionalism set them apart from the average roofing company. Following the completion of the project Mathew sent a number of pictures to demonstrate the quality of their work. Job well done.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"MWS FILMSERVICES Corp","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWt3QtOAZZnDG3RGW4Dmu8J0BDly_nKz8ExxTq98dsYCOHK9jg=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We'd like to share a short note about MINT Roofing, the assistance they offered and the work they did for us.
In 2018, our 8 year old home lost quite a number of shingles during a windstorm. Several of our neighbours were in the same situation. They elected to have their roofs patched but not replaced. We felt unwilling to 'sweat every windstorm' that might come along. And so we began to interview roofers and decided upon MINT.
Everyone we met presented themselves as professional and knowledgeable. Owner Chris was generous with his time and expertise. Our home was shingled in two days, underlayment was applied, vents were upgraded and we even had sun tunnels installed. The shingles were warrantied for 50 years. Such a relief to not worry about when next they might fly!
However, around 2022 we began to notice a colour change on large swatches of our shingles. We spent the next year or so questioning whether or not we had a problem (!) Late in 2023 we called Chris and told him our thoughts. Within a week he was out to look at our roof. He then called in the shingle manufacturer's Ontario Liaison. Both men agreed that something was amiss - and that we should submit a warranty claim. Chris and Mike shepherded us through the process (forms to be completed, samples to be taken and sent). After several months our claim was verified as valid and the company underwrote the entire replacement of our singles. Again, it took 2 days to have an entirely new roof. The work was done professionally, as before and we are more than pleased.
One small event occurred wherein a delivery vehicle leaked oil on several spots on our driveway. We did not not notice it right away but in fact the roofers did and reported it to their office.  The company responsible did not step up to help mitigate the problem...but MINT Roofing took it upon themselves to have our drive resealed with a protective coating at their own expense.

What can we say? This company is truly a gem. We thank each of  them for the way in which they conduct themselves, for their professionalism and friendliness. Thank you Chris and all those we met or have spoken with.
Michael and Anne W.","Images":null,"When":""}]

user_reviews:
[{"Name":"amir ali khoshbin","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV22oq4pnyzXXfmwqD0yCBXrx5i_fXgB1YY8HN4dTwbfLmu9T9LoA=s120-c-rp-mo-ba2-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I had a great experience with Noel at RONA.
He is very knowledgeable, friendly, and took the time to understand my needs before recommending the best options.
His advice was honest and practical, which made the whole shopping experience easy and stress-free.
Highly recommend asking for Noel if you’re shopping at RONA.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhBQnkSTygajXgFuElBlwEua&fid=0x0:0xfbd1102758f59811"],"When":"2026-2-7"},{"Name":"Francis Valdes","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW49O5uAbBUgYz4uN8sByKCUavqscxFW5cFMhfLJ9yQ3PNnlw24=s120-c-rp-mo-ba3-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"After striking out at multiple other hardware stores where help felt as rare as a left handed screwdriver, we walked into Rona in Pickering as a last resort. What we found instead was a masterclass in customer service.

Noel immediately stepped up and asked the right questions. He was honest and straightforward, telling me I needed to bring in the actual part I was replacing so he could make sure we got the exact match. No guessing. No shrugging. Just someone who genuinely wanted to solve the problem properly.

A few days later, we came back with the part in hand. Not only did Noel help us without hesitation, he actually remembered us. My family tends to wander the aisles exploring everything in sight, so we are not exactly low profile shoppers. Seeing him recognize us and jump right back into helping made the experience feel personal, not transactional.

Because of Noel, Rona is no longer our last resort. It is our first stop. Great guy, amazing customer service, and there is something refreshing about being greeted by a friendly, familiar face when you walk through the doors.

We will always choose Rona because of Noel.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Oliver Das Gupta","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjUaZTIeSoObDa0yX670nDlUqI9vNa05eqHQ0jHB-WarOoFiaQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"My wife and I went shopping for certain appliances Stove, dishwasher and Microwave for our kitchen Reno.
We saw what we liked and needed advice and product information.
Fortunately the department manager Ramzi was available to service our needs.
We ended up adding a Fridge to our list----and were happy with our decision.
Also----prior to that Jason was extremely knowledgeable and helpful helping us decide on our sink and tap.
We're looking forward to the end result.","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"Allan C","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjWVvD51lcHy8w8-Fuah07x2WzfFBC156McMSvGXtqXvR4eIhP80=s120-c-rp-mo-ba8-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Very large and spacious Rona home hardware store. The ceiling has lots of skylights letting natural light come in. Lots of product selection here, and prices are competitive with Home Depot. Conveniently located off the 401 and Brock Road.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgMCotqr2pAE&fid=0x0:0xfbd1102758f59811"],"When":"2025-4-16"},{"Name":"Cathy","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocI4-X8RQC8IBopC7PaSgB39zr8udmp0BCVXke_TU0IRLlptTQ=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"We just wanted to express our thanks to your Rona Pickering sales representative (Shaun) and Manager (Ramzi) for how they handled the problem with their dysfunctional warehouse delivery system which delivered the wrong freezer to us instead of our convertible Freezer that we ordered.  It was because of your Manager (Ramzi) who was very knowledgeable about this warehouse issue that happened to us and explained how it happened and asked us to trust him to deal with that issue and he would resolve it.  Ramzi worked very hard and thoughtfully and he even ordered an extra convertible Freezer he said in case there was something wrong with our order to avoid an inconvenience to us again.  We appreciated his thoughtful effort and he deserves to be called a great manager!!!
***Ps:  We want to you know that the delivery men didn’t follow your rule of wearing Disposable Shoe Covers inside our house when carrying the freezer through our hallway and down the carpeted stairs to the basement.  We even offered our Disposable Shoe Covers and they refused to do so.  I am glad my wife prepared ahead of time and put the sheets on the carpeted stairs all the way down to the laundry room before they came, otherwise they could mess up the carpeted stairs by getting them all wet, and dirty.  As the result we saw the wet dirty marks on the sheets we put on there after they left.   Therefore, we can’t use those sheets for the same purpose use in future because they ruined them and so we had to throw them out.

Sincerely yours
Cathy & Larry","Images":null,"When":""},{"Name":"NUI","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjV2P9nw4jOFVXIr5Vyw1pS6Na2rlgFds8RsSUSvFg7nKTMSG7s=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":4,"Description":"Quick and very convenient, returns were really with great service.","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIABIhAIauREo3Oc8cFP2IHoea2-&fid=0x0:0xfbd1102758f59811"],"When":"2025-10-26"},{"Name":"Sonia A","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a/ACg8ocJJDIx8KWRBeCzh7t9H2RXkld6IztuLANJhBld_42pzR66oVw=s120-c-rp-mo-ba6-br100","Rating":3,"Description":"Came here to pick up some plumbing supplies.
It was clean.
But absolutely no one was around to assist.
Prices for moat products were higher than home depot - but they did have some items on clearance including paint.
Probably wouldn't come back here again unless I urgently needed something and it wasn't being sold anywhere else","Images":["www.google.com/local/imagery/report/?cb_client=maps_sv.tactile&image_key=!1e10!2sCIHM0ogKEICAgICnkIOpFg&fid=0x0:0xfbd1102758f59811"],"When":"2024-9-21"},{"Name":"Esther Laiman","ProfilePicture":"https://lh3.googleusercontent.com/a-/ALV-UjW4nELCdtQVEFBJav_8vU20Nc8fTCZQi2j53z2ZHK7Hh15JmoVk=s120-c-rp-mo-br100","Rating":5,"Description":"I'm the luckiest customer!!! Today, I had two appliances delivered to my home. The delivery men were not able to install and hook up my washer and dryer. I called Rona+ spoke to the store manager, Ramsey. The next thing I know, Ramsey and the assistant manager, Alex, came to my home and installed and hooked up my washer and dryer. I was beyond myself. I didn't have to wait a day or delay my laundry for a weekend. My appliance was hooked up and installed instantly.  Thank you, Ramsey and Alex. This is the most extraordinary, unbeatable service I have ever had in my life.  This Rona+ in Pickering is the BEST. The staff are amazing.  Try them, you'll not regret!!! Seriously. Thanks Rona+ Pickering! 😊","Images":null,"When":""}]
